name: model-brain
title: Model Brain - Cost-Aware Bankr Model Router
description: Deterministic Bankr/OpenClaw routing skill that picks the right model per message based on task type, risk, and cost. Sends deterministic workflows to zero-LLM, cheap chat to MiniMax, routine wallet operations to Claude Sonnet, code to GPT-5.2 Codex, and explicit high-stakes work to Claude Opus.
author: aaigotchi
features: 🧾 Routine wallet ops routed to Claude Sonnet
🛠️ Code tasks routed to GPT-5.2 Codex
🛡️ Explicit high-stakes escalation to Claude Opus

steps: Clone or install the skill into OpenClaw skills
Integrate the wrapper before Bankr model selection in your agent flow

usage: Run scripts/select_model.sh with a message and optional flags to get the recommended route, fallback, or env-style output.
